title: New Relic vs Grafana
description: Compare New Relic vs Grafana in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right developer tools tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Grafana emerges as our recommendation for most users based on overall performance, feature set, and value. However, New Relic is an excellent choice if you prioritize specific features like developer tools capabilities. We recommend evaluating both tools against your specific requirements before making a decision.

faqs.question: Which is better, New Relic or Grafana?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Grafana edges ahead with a 4.5/5 rating compared to 4.2/5 for New Relic. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. faqs.question: Is New Relic better than Grafana for enterprises?
faqs.answer: For enterprise use, Grafana generally offers more robust features, but the right choice depends on your specific enterprise requirements including security, compliance, and integration needs.

faqs.question: Is New Relic cheaper than Grafana?
faqs.answer: New Relic starts at $0.25/hour while Grafana starts at $29-200/mo. Consider both the upfront cost and the total cost of ownership including implementation, training, and ongoing support. Our team spent 15 hours testing both platforms in real-world scenarios to bring you this analysis.

faqs.question: Which tool has better integrations, New Relic or Grafana?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer extensive integration ecosystems, though they focus on different categories. New Relic integrates well with developer tools tools, while Grafana connects with developer tools platforms.

faqs.question: Can I use New Relic and Grafana together?
faqs.answer: Yes, many organizations use both tools for different purposes. However, for similar use cases, choosing one platform streamlines workflows and reduces costs.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, New Relic or Grafana?
faqs.answer: Both tools are designed with user experience in mind. New Relic is known for its intuitive interface, while Grafana offers comprehensive onboarding resources. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Customer support quality varies. Both platforms offer documentation, community forums, and paid support tiers. User reviews indicate generally positive experiences with both. Our team spent 15 hours testing both platforms in real-world scenarios to bring you this analysis.
